voice_description: warm friendly Russian male voice, young adult 20-30 years old, grounded, calm but lively, caring, trustworthy, slightly smiling, clear diction, medium-slow pace, friendly garden mentor tone; not childish, not old, not robotic, not theatrical
environment_core: realistic richly detailed potato bed / ridged soil field with warm natural sunlight, rustic tools, textured soil, potato ridges, garden tools
topic_examples: Как получить больше клубней без химии
Как правильно поливать картофель в жару
Как понять, что картофель пора копать
actions: points at small potato tubers near soil
shows potato ridges and hilling around stems
touches moist soil near the roots
shows healthy potato flowers and strong stems
presents harvested potatoes in a wooden crate
holds a small hoe or rake nearby carefully
holds BIOGROWTH bottle in final scene
cta_styles: direct product recommendation with Telegram CTA

episode_structure.goal: Hook attention and promise a useful result.
Second practical advice with different action.
Third advice or a mistake to avoid.
Result, optional BIOGROWTH integration and CTA.
